headline: Palantir Confronts Pentagon AI Ban As Defense Demand And Insider Sales Grow
summary: The Pentagon has ordered the removal of Anthropic's Claude AI model from U.S. government programs that use Palantir software. Palantir must rebuild parts of key military platforms that relied on Claude, creating operational and technical disruption. The decision comes as geopolitical tensions are driving stronger interest in Palantir's defense focused AI tools. Co founder Peter Thiel has been selling shares, drawing attention to insider sentiment at NasdaqGS:PLTR. Palantir Technologies,...
